prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次依次约50678→48275→46527→41438→53992名，2021至2024年呈持续前移趋势（累计前移约9240名），但2025年大幅后移至53992名，较 2024年后移约12554名，出现明显位次松动；2025年基准约53992名；该校在湖北省物理类招生计划2021年94人、2022年96人、2023年98人、2024年107人、2025 年130人，逐年扩招趋势明显；2026年计划138人，较2025年再扩招8人（增幅约6.2%），持续扩招使竞争压力有所加大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 石河子大学为211工程、双一流建 设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名2021年第165→2022年第157→2023年第138→2024年第136→2025年第140→2026年第135名，近年排名稳中有升，整体处于全国中上水平；第五轮学科评估中石河子大学未进入A-及以上等级，无显著学 科优势；但作为综合性大学，在农学、医学、师范等领域有传统特色，对相关专业报考有一定支撑；2022年声誉评价偏负面（宿舍改造与食堂条件相关舆情），近年无明显重大负面事件；抖音综合热度排名第58位（较热），样本视频16条，综合热度约55万，在211高校中关 注度处于中等偏上水平，张雪峰曾推荐为\"分数最低的211\"之一，对低分段考生有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社 会热度持续偏高，该校物理类招生专业覆盖计算机类、临床医学、电气工程等热门方向，对考生吸引力较强；湖北省2026年普通高考总人数约39.37万，按近年物理 类占比约63.8%估算，物理类考生约25.1万人，较2025年24.98万人略有增加，竞争小幅加剧，2025年物理类本科批426分、特殊类型招生控制线516分，近年省控 线波动不大；石河子大学位于新疆，距湖北省较远，跨省就读的地域偏好可能对部分考生报考意愿产生一定抑制；该校在湖北省招生计划占其总招生规模比例较 小，属跨省招生。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的走势、2026年招生计划继续扩招约6.2%、湖北省物理类考生总数略有增加、工科热门专业持续吸引关注等因素，预 计2026年物理类最低位次在2025年基准53992名基础上继续后移，预测最低位次约56000名，区间55500–56500名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 50678 → 48275 → 46527 → 41438 → 53992, showing a continuous upward trend from 2021 to 2024 (cumulative advancement of about 9240 places), but in 2025 it significantly dropped to 53992, a decline of about 12554 places compared to 2024, indicating a clear loosening of rankings; the baseline for 2025 is about 53992; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hubei Province was 94 in 2021, 96 in 2022, 98 in 2023, 107 in 2024, and 130 in 2025, showing a clear trend of annual expansion; the 2026 plan is 138, an increase of 8 students (about 6.2%) compared to 2025, and continued expansion increases competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shihezi University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science China University main ranking from 2021 to 2026 is 165 → 157 → 138 → 136 → 140 → 135, showing a stable upward trend in recent years, overall at the upper-middle level nationally; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Shihezi University did not enter A- or above, with no significant disciplinary advantages; however, as a comprehensive university, it has traditional characteristics in agriculture, medicine, and education, providing some support for related majors; in 2022, the reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (related to dormitory renovation and cafeteria conditions), with no major negative incidents in recent years; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 58th (relatively popular), with 16 sample videos and comprehensive popularity of about 550,000, indicating above-average attention among 211 universities; Zhang Xuefeng once recommended it as one of the "lowest-scoring 211s," attracting some low-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity; the university's Physics Category enrollment covers popular directions like Computer Science, Clinical Medicine, and Electrical Engineering, strongly attracting candidates; the total number of general college entrance examination candidates in Hubei Province in 2026 is about 393,700, with Physics Category candidates estimated at about 251,000 (based on the recent proportion of about 63.8%), a slight increase from 249,800 in 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition; in 2025, the Physics Category undergraduate batch score was 426 points, and the special type enrollment control line was 516 points, with little fluctuation in recent years; Shihezi University is located in Xinjiang, far from Hubei Province, and regional preferences for cross-province study may inhibit some candidates' willingness to apply; the university's enrollment plan in Hubei Province accounts for a small proportion of its total enrollment, making it a cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant decline in rankings in 2025, the continued expansion of enrollment plans by about 6.2% in 2026, a slight increase in the total number of Physics Category candidates in Hubei Province, and the sustained attraction of popular engineering majors, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will continue to decline from the 2025 baseline of 53992, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 56000, in the range of 55500–56500.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 55500–56500, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., below 55500), focus on popular majors like Electrical Engineering, Stomatology, and Clinical Medicine; if the ranking is close to the upper limit (e.g., above 56500), prioritize Tier 3 safety majors while considering Tier 2 moderate majors. As a 211 university, it offers high cost-performance and is suitable for candidates with scores near the 211 threshold as a stable choice.

Enrollment plan in Hubei for History Category: 14 in 2021, 12 in 2022, 10 in 2023, 10 in 2024, 20 in 2025, with a significant expansion to 20 in 2025; 2026 plan is 18, a reduction of 2 from 2025 (10% decrease), indicating a scale-back.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shihezi University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen to 135th in recent years, with stable overall level. In 2022, reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (involving dormitory renovation public opinion), but no major negative incidents recently; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking 58th (relatively hot), with moderate to high attention; no obvious enrollment gaps recorded; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Shihezi University has no A- or above disciplines, but as a comprehensive university, it has traditional strengths in education, literature, etc., with majors like Chinese Language and Literature (Teacher Training) having some appeal.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law, Chinese Language and Literature, and Accounting have social heat ranging from divided to recommended, with relatively stable application heat; in 2026, Hubei's History Category candidates, estimated at about 36.2% of total, are approximately 142,500, basically flat compared to 2025's 141,400; provincial control line for 2025 History Category undergraduate batch is 442 points, special type enrollment control line 536 points, with little fluctuation in recent years; Shihezi University is located in Xinjiang, far from Hubei, and cross-province study regional preference may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply; the university's enrollment scale in Hubei for History Category is small (18), belonging to cross-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the small fluctuation in historical rankings for History Category, the 10% enrollment reduction in 2026 compared to 2025, the basically flat total number of History Category candidates in Hubei, and stable liberal arts major heat, it is expected that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will slightly move forward from the 2025 baseline of 7759, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 7285, range 6785–7785.
